author: y4rr
content: Plan (Level 2/3): Write new inception.rs with: BasicConv2d helper (Conv2d bias=false + BatchNorm2d eps=1e-3 + ReLU; children indexed conv/bn matching torchvision); 5 Mixed structs (InceptionA/B/C/D/E) using BasicConv2d sub-blocks with torchvision-exact branch names (branch1x1, branch5x5_1/2, branch3x3dbl_1/2/3, branch_pool, etc.); InceptionV3 with full stem (Conv2d_1a/2a/2b + maxpool1 + Conv2d_3b/4a + maxpool2) + 11 Mixed (5b/c/d, 6a-e, 7a-c) + avgpool + dropout + fc. Eval-mode forward path. Replace existing InceptionModule, update mod.rs/surface inventory. New value-parity test gated on regenerated fixture.
